# BP-70 negative: the logged error branch exits before normal execution continues.
lang: go
file: BP-70-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "log"

func loadConfig() (data []byte, err error) {
	data, err = readConfig()
	if err != nil {
		log.Printf("read config failed: %v", err)
		return
	}
	return
}

func readConfig() ([]byte, error) { return nil, nil }
